questions.question: In the `useForm` composable pattern, what does the `touched` object track?
options: Which fields have been modified since the form was last submitted
Which fields the user has interacted with (visited and left)
Which fields currently have validation errors
Which fields are required versus optional

questions.question: When should you use VeeValidate or FormKit instead of a custom composable?
options: Whenever the form has more than 3 fields
When you need schema-based validation, dynamic array fields, or async validation
Only for forms that submit to a REST API
When the form uses `v-model` instead of template refs

questions.question: What is the core data structure recommended for holding form state in Vue?
options: A `ref` containing a plain string for each field
A `reactive` object containing all field values
A Pinia store with individual state properties
An array of `ref` values matching the field order
